Open /account/addresses/add. Submit the form with all fields blank (but include csrf_token). Confirm the response contains the string 'Please correct the highlighted fields.' near the top of the form.

Open /account/addresses/add. Submit only csrf_token (leave name, street, city, state, zip blank). Confirm the rendered page contains an element with id='err-full_name' AND id='err-address_line1' AND id='err-city' AND id='err-state' AND id='err-zip_code'.

Open /account/payment/add. Submit with cardholder_name filled but card_number=''. Confirm only #err-card_number is rendered and #err-cardholder_name is NOT in the HTML.
Open /account/payment/add. Submit with all fields valid. Confirm the success path (redirect to /account/payment) and no form-error element renders.

POST /account/addresses/add with all fields filled except city. Confirm the response renders the form again with #err-city containing a non-empty error message.
POST /account/addresses/add with all fields filled except state. Confirm the response renders the form again with #err-state containing a non-empty error message.
POST /account/addresses/add with all fields filled except zip_code. Confirm the response renders the form again with #err-zip_code containing a non-empty error message.
POST /account/payment/add with cardholder_name empty (other fields valid). Confirm the response renders #err-cardholder_name and the input has aria-invalid='true'.
POST /account/payment/add with card_number empty (other fields valid). Confirm the response renders #err-card_number and the input has aria-invalid='true'.
